directive.title: FLOWSEER-RESP-002c — Remaining Dashboard Pages Inline Chart Remediation

auditor.summary: Build FAILS due to critical issues: only 2 of 5 required files were generated, the generated code creates files that should already exist (violating spec constraints), uses ResponsiveChartWrapper with an incorrect API pattern (render-prop vs children), and uses hardcoded container dimensions that will fail at the required 393px viewport. The build is incomplete and would not compile or pass acceptance criteria. Score 40 reflects that most acceptance criteria cannot be satisfied with the current output.

top_issues.description: Only 2 of 5 required files were generated. Files app/dashboard/risk-heatmap/page.tsx, app/dashboard/contract-timeline/page.tsx, and app/dashboard/savings-tracker/page.tsx are missing. The build is incomplete and cannot satisfy acceptance criteria.

This file should NOT be created. The build spec explicitly states 'Do NOT modify components/charts/ResponsiveChartWrapper.tsx, lib/charts/calcTickInterval.ts, or lib/charts/clampTooltipPosition.ts — consume them as-is from FLOWSEER-RESP-002.' These files should already exist from a previous directive. Creating them violates the spec constraints.
Same as above — this file should not be created. It should already exist from FLOWSEER-RESP-002. Creating it violates spec constraints.
